notes: System recovery focus. 40% volume reduction to heal micro-tears and prevent CNS fatigue. Keep left shoulder healthy.

schedule.Tuesday: Trening B (Leg Day & Cardio Engine - Deload)

exercises.name: Push-up
exercises.notes: Bodyweight, strict tempo, RPE 6. Deload — do not push to failure.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Landmine Press
exercises.notes: Mobility/activation focus. Shoulder-safe plane. Light load, controlled movement.

exercises.name: Floor Press
exercises.notes: Dumbbell Floor Press @ 10kg per dumbbell. Mapped as BENCH_PRESS/DUMBBELL_FLOOR_PRESS. Floor blocks deep extension — shoulder safe.

workouts.name: Trening B (Leg Day & Cardio Engine - Deload)

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: No bottom isometric pause this week (removed for deload recovery). Standard controlled tempo.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Lunge
exercises.notes: No external weight. Bodyweight only for joint recovery.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.notes: EMOM FINISHER: 6-minute EMOM — 15 swings at the start of each minute for 6 minutes. Total: 90 explosive swings @ 16kg KB. Cardio substitute. Explosive hip drive.

exercises.name: Pull-up
exercises.notes: Using thick assistance band. Strictly recovery pace — no grinding. Deload sets.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Dropped from 35kg to 30kg for deload. Drive down with the elbows.

exercises.name: Banded Face Pulls
exercises.notes: High volume blood flow pump for left shoulder recovery. Light resistance band @ 10kg equivalent. Focus on external rotation at peak.

workouts.name: Trening D (Conditioning - ACTIVE REST)
workouts.notes: Complete nervous system rest. Optional evening low-impact walk by the coast if weather permits.
